data.content: Revised plan (v2) addresses all review feedback: 1) WaveBeat alias field added to type, OpenAPI schema, and /api/waves route construction; 2) DepTree alias resolution via enriching BeatDependency with alias during listDependencies() using showKnot lookups for linked IDs; 3) Test coverage expanded to include toBeat() mapping, listDependencies() enrichment, waves API propagation, and component rendering. ~12 files, medium complexity.
